content_body:
Thank you so much for allowing us to stay in your amazing cabin! It's so tasteful and i love every single detail. It's so beautiful!

Your website photos do not do justice to how beautiful your cabin really is and how beautiful the outdoor surroundings are. 

Our Thanksgiving 2021 will be a treasured memory for years to come! Thank you so much ~ The Gomez Family
title: Thanksgiving in the North GA Mountains
